description: Audit the projects/ toolkit and add --help to tools that are missing it

tasks.title: Audit projects/ toolkit for missing --help flags
tasks.description: Run each Python tool in projects/ and check whether it supports a --help flag. For each tool, record: does it have --help? Does it have a docstring? Does it have a --plain flag for piped output? Write a structured report to knowledge/plans/tool-health-20260320/audit.md with a table: tool name, has --help (yes/no), has --plain (yes/no), notes. Sort by most-cited tools first (use citations.py --json output for ordering).

tasks.title: Add --help to the top 5 tools missing it
tasks.description: Read knowledge/plans/tool-health-20260320/audit.md from the health-audit step. Identify the 5 most-cited tools that lack a --help flag (or have a weak one). Add a proper --help with argparse to each, showing usage examples that match the tool's actual behavior. Don't change any functionality — just add help text. Each tool should show its name, what it does, and at least 2 usage examples.
